home.hero_para: Specialist hypnotherapy for GLP-1 users reducing medication, and for women ready to lose weight and find lasting calm — without injections.
home.pillar1_desc: Specialist support for reducing or coming off Wegovy, Ozempic or Mounjaro.
home.pillar2_desc: A structured hypnotherapy programme for lasting weight loss without injections.
home.pillar3_desc: Evidence-backed hypnotherapy for hot flushes, anxiety, sleep, and confidence.
home.quote_text: The mind is everything. What you think, you become — and I'm here to help you think differently.
home.editorial_para1: So many people come to me having tried every diet, every programme, every quick fix.
home.editorial_para2: Hypnotherapy works at the subconscious level — where habits, emotional triggers and identity actually live.
home.cta_heading: Your first session is a free, no-pressure conversation.
home.cta_para: We'll talk about where you are, where you'd like to be, and how I can support you.

about.bio_para1: I'm a certified hypnotherapist and NLP practitioner, and one of the first people in the UK to certify as a GLP-1 Weight Loss Practitioner.
about.bio_para2: My approach is warm, non-judgemental and deeply individual.
about.approach_intro: Every session is tailored to you. There's no one-size-fits-all here.
about.approach1_desc: Your first session is a conversation. I'll listen without judgement.
about.approach2_desc: Together, we'll map out a programme tailored to your specific needs.
about.approach3_desc: Through a blend of hypnotherapy, guided relaxation and practical tools.
about.t1_text: I was fortunate to have a session of hypnotherapy with Karyn.
about.t2_text: My daughter has an extreme phobia of spiders… there is a HUGE difference.
about.t3_text: I was able to move around comfortably after our session.
about.t4_text: Reduced anxiety… I am sleeping through the night.
about.cta_heading: I'd love to hear your story.
about.cta_para: Your free consultation is completely confidential.

weightloss.hero_para: Whether you're reducing GLP-1 medication or looking for a non-injection route.
weightloss.prog1_intro: For people planning to reduce or stop Wegovy, Ozempic or Mounjaro.
weightloss.prog1_detail: This programme is for you if you are worried about weight regain.
weightloss.prog2_heading: A Hypnotherapy Alternative to GLP-1 Medication
weightloss.prog2_detail: Most plans focus on rules. Hypnotherapy focuses on the automatic patterns underneath.
weightloss.explainer_heading: This is not generic weight-loss hypnosis
weightloss.explainer_para: GLP-1 users have a very specific psychological landscape.
weightloss.cta_heading: Ready to feel differently about food?
weightloss.cta_para: Your first session is free, confidential and completely no-pressure.

menopause.hero_para: A compassionate, whole-person approach to perimenopause and menopause.
menopause.stat_label: Reduction in hot flushes & night sweats
menopause.stat_source: Hypnosis shown to be as effective as HRT — Psychology Today
menopause.intro_heading: This is a transition, not an ending.
menopause.intro_para1: Menopause can be one of the most disorienting seasons of a woman's life.
menopause.intro_para2: This programme is designed specifically for women in perimenopause and menopause.
menopause.intro_italic: No longer feel invisible and own this next chapter of your life.
menopause.evidence_para1: Clinical research has shown that hypnotherapy can be an effective, natural approach.
menopause.evidence_para2: For women seeking a non-hormonal, drug-free option, hypnotherapy is increasingly recognised.
menopause.featured_quote: So many women see menopause as an ending. But I've discovered this is your moment to reinvent yourself.
menopause.cta_heading: Let's talk about where you are.
menopause.cta_para: Your free consultation is a warm, judgement-free conversation.

booking.hero_para: Select a time that works for you. Your initial consultation is free, confidential, and completely no-pressure.
booking.consult_para: This is a relaxed, informal conversation — a chance for us to meet.
booking.booking_note: Sessions are available online via secure video call, or in person.
